calendar.matters:
Request For Order: Modification: Lower Arrears Liquidation Payment
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: (416) 08/27/2012
(Lyons) Clerk: Kevin M. Lee; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian CSR #12355; Bailiff: Deputy Watts. General advisement given in regards to Commissioner Catherine Lyons sitting as a judge pro tempore. Mother not present; Father present, In Pro Per; DCSS Court officer, Jennifer Miralda, present; CSA = Boselli. Matter is on calendar for request for order re: modification - lower arrears liquidation payment. DCSS attorney briefly summarizes the status of the case. This case only involves arrears at this time. Father is in agreement to the court-ordered rate proposed by DCSS. Motion is granted. The Findings and Orders of the Court were signed and filed in court this day, and are incorporated herein by reference.
